titlestmt.titleproper: New York Grape Country Cooperative records6709
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Evan Fay Earle

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-10-03 18:21:44 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York Grape Country Cooperative records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, Financial Records, Legal Documents, Printed Materials, Publications
did.abstract: Ephemera, correspondence, and financial records and industry related material.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: New York Grape Country Co-Op was incorporated into produce and market vinefresh, the pink grape juice made from wine grapes grown in New York State, primarily in the Finger Lakes region.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records document the production, marketing, and sale of Vinefresh, the pink grape juice, through board records, reports, correspondence, production and sales ledgers and promotional materials.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York Grape Country Cooperative, #6709. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 3 (grower information) restricted until 2025, 2026, 2035, and 2055 as marked or by permission of the curator.

did.unittitle: Marketing and press releases for Vinefresh
Vinefresh report to the board of directors
Grower forms, marketing agreement, inspection certificate, various
Survey of growers, re: Taylor grape purchase price
New York Fresh Fruit and Vegetable Promotion Day
Radio and media lists for promotions
Markets - farms, roadside - survey and contacts
Food broker information, Bratt-Foster Inc., RSL Associates Inc., others.
Administrative reports, meeting documents, bylaws, voting
New York Association of Wine Producers
Frank L. Haveron Company Inc. - Food brokers
Hogan-Souhan Dairy, Berry Good Inc. - Grape juice bottling
Horwitz Paper and Packaging Company Inc. - plastic cups
Ketchum Public Relations - marketing materials, brochures
New York Wine and Grape Foundation
Sayles, Evans, Braryton, Palmer, and Tifft Attorneys at Law- Edward B. Hoffman
Williams, Stevens, McCarville, and Frizzel Attorneys at Lawl
Finger Lakes Finest pink grape juice
Vinefresh product information, brochure, press clippings
November wine month juice tastings - Televison station promotions
Grower information, grower payment schedule, prices paid per ton, vineyard gallonage, NYAWP dues

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricteduntil 2025 or permission of archivist.

did.unittitle: New York State Grape Growers VineFresh Grape Juice :30 second television advertisement, VHS
